footer.description: Advanced thermal vacuum systems for aerospace qualification, space simulation, and environmental testing.

consent.mapDescription: To display the interactive map, content from Google Maps must be loaded. After activation, personal data such as your IP address may be transmitted to Google.

form.consentText: I agree that this data may be stored and processed for the purpose of contacting me. I am aware that I can withdraw my consent at any time.
form.confidentialNote: Your inquiry will be handled confidentially by our engineering team.

placeholders.project: e.g. Satellite qualification chamber, custom TVAC system, retrofit project
placeholders.messageDetailed: Describe your test requirements, chamber specifications, or integration needs...

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.messageMinLength: Please enter a more detailed message (minimum 10 characters).
validation.consentRequired: Please accept the data processing consent to proceed.

success.title: Thank You
success.message: Your inquiry has been received. Our team typically responds within two business days.
success.messagePage: Your message has been received. Our engineering team typically responds within two business days.
success.toast: Your inquiry has been sent successfully.

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many submissions. Please try again later.
errors.submissionFailed: Submission failed. Please try again later or contact us at info@deepvac.space.
errors.submissionFailedDirect: Submission failed. Please try again later or contact us directly at info@deepvac.space.

mediaCredits.seoDescription: Source references and attribution for media used on the Deepvac website.
